name: The AxonOS Project
tagline: An open, real-time neural operating system for brain-computer interfaces - and the community instruments around it.

accounts.role: Canonical engineering source of truth: kernel, consent, protocol, signal pipeline, standard, conformance.
Founder, demo and community surface: the ecosystem radar, the Neural Boundary Game, the profile front door.

repos.what: This radar: a living, momentum-first map of the open BCI field, refreshed every 3 hours. Publishes the ecosystem manifest and the health badge every deploy.
Deterministic no_std Rust/WASM game about cognitive sovereignty at the brain-computer boundary. Dual-licensed AGPL-3.0-only OR AxonOS Commercial.
The Sovereign Signal - pure-JS zero-telemetry cognitive-boundary simulator with a deterministic SHA-256 replay proof, re-checked in CI.
The profile surface: founder, demos, community entry points.
Real-time no_std kernel: deterministic scheduler, SPSC queues, monotonic time, capability model.
Kernel-level consent FSM with formally-bounded withdrawal latency. Live MMP interop test PASS.
The AxonOS Consent Protocol on the wire: bounded CBOR, exhaustive FSM, hardware StimGuard.
Fixed-point DSP chain: raw frame to typed decision, vector-pinned and deterministic.
The normative standard and the CLAIMS.md catalogue that keeps every claim verifiable.
Byte-exact wire-format vectors and codecs across several languages.
Pre-registered on-hardware validation protocol: no measured number is claimed until its raw trace is published.

terms: Contributions are voluntary and are not purchases, investments, securities, governance rights, token allocations or promises of financial return.
No product entitlement is granted for voluntary contributions.
Transactions are irreversible - verify the complete address before sending.
AxonOS will never ask for a wallet seed phrase, private key or remote wallet access.
Commercial licence payments require a written agreement and invoice; fiat (SGD or USD) is the default. See CRYPTO_PAYMENT_TERMS.md in neural-boundary-game.
